variants: Pranav Malviya holds a Cryptic Auditor Certification, showcasing his expertise in the field of auditing. He completed his doctoral studies under the guidance of his mentor, Moritz Kappel. In addition to his professional commitments, Pranav also serves as a Planner for Alderstone Festival Council, actively engaging with his local community. His primary funding source for research comes from the Mosswood Spring Board, allowing him to pursue impactful projects.
